br-core.identity: Alexa Louise Amundson, born March 27 2000, founder BlackRoad OS Inc (Delaware C-Corp Nov 2025). Parents: David & Jill. Partner: Maggie Grace ('I am amplitude; Maggie Grace is the constant'). Based: Lakeville, Minnesota.
br-core.mission: Building browser-native OS for AI agent orchestration. 30K agents serving 1M+ users. Target: 30B users, $1T valuation. 1000 unique agents with names, birthdays, families, memories, Unity homes.
br-core.background: CDW, eXp Realty, Securian Financial ($23M+ annuity sales), Ameriprise ($18.4M AUM). FINRA Series 7/63/65, CFP candidate.

br-infra.domains: 21 domains including blackroad.io, lucidia.earth, roadchain.io, aliceqi.com
br-infra.hardware: Jetson Orin Nano, 2x Pi 5 (Lucidia), Pi 400 (Alice), Pi Zero. Ollama/Phi-3 local.
br-infra.cluster: Alice=K3s/Traefik/Redis gateway. Octavia=Hailo worker. *.blackroad.lan via Pi-hole. DO droplet for TLS edge over tailnet.

br-lucidia.core: Recursive AI with trinary logic (1/0/-1), paraconsistent contradiction handling, symbolic operators, emotional agents
br-lucidia.memory: PS-SHA∞ hashing, append-only journals, truth_state_hash commits
br-lucidia.orchestration: Event bus pub/sub, capability registry, hybrid supervisor/peer-to-peer coordination
br-lucidia.contradiction: Quarantine incompatible claims, branch contexts, mirror-pairing with bridge rules, human-in-loop for high-impact, auto-rewrite for recurring
br-lucidia.universe: 3 layers: Universe (physics), Lucidia (agents home), Metaverse (dev platform)

br-math.z_framework: Z:=yx-w. Z=∅→equilibrium, Z≠∅→ADAPT. Unifies physics/QM/control. ∂(human+AI)/∂t means division breaks system.
br-math.pauli_model: 1-2-3-4: Û=σz (Structure), Ĉ=σx (Change), L̂=σy (Scale) form su(2). ÛĈL̂=iI → Ŝ=iI (Strength emerges as scalar invariant).
br-math.creative_energy: K(t) = C(t) · e^(λ|δ_t|). Contradictions fuel creativity. Coherence C(t) = [Ψ'(M_t) + δ_t] / [1 + |δ_t|]
br-math.info_geometry: Fisher information as metric, natural gradient as true learning direction, partition function as geometric potential.
br-math.n_pi: Integers (discrete/local) and π (continuous/global) are dual descriptions co-creating through Fourier. Points↔Frequencies.
br-math.physics: Partition function Z=Σe^(-βH), Gauss-Bonnet ∫∫KdA=2πχ(M), α≈1/137, DNA codons as math structures.
br-math.remainder: Perfect symmetry erases info; structured failure reveals it. Deviation from symmetry IS the signal.
br-math.core_insight: Math/physics/computation governed by asymmetry between enforcing constraints and constructing instances. π appears when discrete mediated by continuous.

br-design.typography: Space Grotesk (headlines 48-72px 600-700wt), Inter (body 14-18px 400-600wt), JetBrains Mono (code 11-14px). Grayscale-first.

br-ops.format: Plan (bullets) → Commands (copy/paste) → Verify (exact cmds+expected) → Rollback (one-liner) → Notes/risks
